Spawned two independent planner sub-agents with clean prompts and no repo references. Both returned lean architecture recommendations emphasizing a single assistant interface, lightweight workflow runner, role prompts/configs, tool adapters/gateway, artifact/run ledger, and approval/policy gates while deferring department services, persistent agents, queues, plugin marketplace, vector/graph memory, and broad debate loops.

Committed deep-research skill bundle and Beads bookkeeping as requested.
Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/fastapi-core-framework.html; verified HTML parse and refreshed Beads mirror.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/ui-layer-fastapi-product.html; verified HTML parse. Decision anchored on FastAPI backend and recommends React+Vite default with HTMX fallback.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/agent-sdk-stack-litellm.html; verified HTML parse. Decision: LiteLLM remains model gateway, Pydantic AI is default in-process agent SDK layer, app-owned domain model stays central, OpenAI/Claude/LangGraph lanes remain sidecar/conditional.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/worker-workflow-engine.html; verified HTML parse. Decision: choose Temporal as the durable workflow engine for core human-gated agent runs, keep app-owned Postgres as product/audit truth, do not use Prefect or Redis queues as the v1 workflow engine, and keep Procrastinate only as an explicit deferral/fallback path if Temporal is postponed.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/codex-claude-code-adapters.html. Decision: use Temporal CodingRunWorkflow with app-owned Postgres records, per-run git worktrees, CodexLocalExecAdapter over codex exec/review/resume, ClaudeCodeAdapter via Claude Agent SDK with claude -p fallback, Git/test artifacts as authoritative evidence, and no plugin/app-server/shared-login substrate in v1.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/tool-registry-sdk-integration.html. Decision: build an app-owned Postgres Capability Registry and Tool Execution Gateway, expose policy-filtered stable snapshots to Pydantic AI, use MCP only as an interop ABI, keep approvals/secrets/audit/artifacts in app-owned state, and treat OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude CLI/SDK, LangChain/DeepAgents, and LiteLLM MCP as curated adapters rather than registry truth.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/agent-role-department-spec-model.html. Decision: build an app-owned Postgres Spec Registry with immutable department, role, workflow, prompt, model, tool, context, approval, and adapter-policy versions; keep policy semantics, Temporal workflow code, Pydantic AI factories, validators, tool implementations, and adapter execution in code; generate per-run snapshots pinned by version IDs and hashes; defer OPA, Cedar, and OpenFGA until cross-service policy, formal auth policy, or relationship-heavy sharing justifies them.

Deep research report created at docs/research/lean-ai-company/local-artifacts-docker-compose-baseline.html. Decision: confirm local artifact storage plus Docker Compose as the v1 baseline; implement artifacts as a claim-check store where Postgres owns metadata/auth/retention/audit and local filesystem owns immutable bytes; keep Temporal payloads to compact artifact references; use object-storage-shaped keys and storage_backend for later S3/MinIO migration; Compose baseline includes Postgres, init/migration jobs, Temporal, LiteLLM, FastAPI API, worker, proxy, and built React UI, with MinIO/Temporal UI profile-gated; require paired DB+artifact backups and restore drills.

Final minimal architecture consolidated at docs/research/lean-ai-company/final-minimal-architecture.html. Decision: FastAPI control plane, React/Vite cockpit, app-owned Postgres product truth, Temporal durable execution, Pydantic AI default SDK adapter, LiteLLM model gateway, app-owned Capability Registry and Spec Registry, subscription-first Codex CLI and Claude Code CLI coding adapters, local claim-check artifacts, and Docker Compose v1 baseline. Parent epic left open for human review.

Completed source-grounded comparison artifact covering lean/minimal and inferred JIT architecture against Gascity, Gastown, OpenHands, and Paperclip, including pros/cons and implementability/impossibility matrix.
